comment: SPSA over all 33 inversion params -- the kind SPSA actually suits: smooth EMD metric, feasible start (none baseline clips 0, no penalty cliffs), many params (2 evals/iter beats CMA-ES's popsize cost). NOTE the gain `a` is tuned to the EMD scale: the objective is tiny (~0.03-0.06), so its gradient is tiny, so `a` must be LARGE (~2) to move params meaningfully -- this is SPSA's scale sensitivity. If the per-iteration curve barely moves, raise `a`; if it thrashes, lower it. budget ~= 2*max_iters = 120 evals; inversion evals are expensive, so restrict --rolls / lower max_iters for a quick probe first.
